candidates.why: Direct production input cost and best income-statement match for cost of goods sold.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket and strong SG&A component.
Selling expense component, but likely contained within broader other operating expenses bucket.

Equity/balance-sheet line, not current-period SG&A expense.

variables.notes: CR:c||misclassified. No explicit single SG&A row exists. Chose best overhead buckets: personnel plus other operating expenses. Included 'Research & Development Expenses' as well because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense and the selected overhead buckets do not clearly state that R&D is already embedded; this allows PROF to use XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD correctly.

Equivalent total line, but if used for BE then MIB should be zero to avoid double counting; less preferred than 'Total Equity'.

variables.notes: No separate 'equity attributable to owners/parent' line is present. Using 'Total Equity' as BE and setting MIB to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Could indicate equity including NCI, but values are identical to 'Total Equity', implying no separate minority interest is reported.

variables.notes: No distinct minority interest/non-controlling interest line is present. 'Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals 'Total Equity' in all shown years, indicating no separately reported MIB.
